Hi________, 

  

    Welcome to the UMGCCC FlowCore! The training process for our facility begins with first viewing the lecture created by our Director, Dr. Xiaoxuan Fan, you can find the lecture here.  Once you have viewed the flow lecture, please create an account on iLabs to schedule training sessions.   

In order to sign up, you must register for our online scheduling and billing system:  iLabs.  It takes less than 5 minutes, you merely need to go to https://cibr.umaryland.edu/landing/1754, and go to the upper right-hand corner to sign in as a new user.   Follow the prompt instructions and then wait for your PI to approve your usage.  

Training sessions are booked for one hour with a maximum of 10 samples to include: unstained cells, single color controls (on cells or beads) and any additional samples as you need.  Typically, training is completed after 3 assisted use sessions to make sure you can run the instrument on your own. 

Check out our google site for more information. https://sites.google.com/view/umgcccflow/home  

If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out, we look forward to working with you. 

  

-Your FlowCore Team 

 

 Provided you have any issues registering to iLabs you may contact Tom McHugh.
